jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - InfraMantra - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!
